idea-plugin.name: DiffLink
idea-plugin.description: Navigate and compare files with @DiffLink markers directly from the editor gutter. Add @DiffLink:path/to/file or @DiffLink:source, destination to a comment or plain-text document, then click the gutter icon to open IntelliJ IDEA's built-in diff viewer. DiffLink is designed for IntelliJ IDEA Community and Ultimate on the 2023.2 platform and works across common text-based file types including Java, Kotlin, Python, JavaScript, Markdown, XML, shell scripts, and configuration files.
